<?php namespace Twilio\Jwt\TaskRouter; /** * Twilio TaskRouter TaskQueue Capability assigner * * @author Justin Witz <justin.witz@twilio.com> * @license http://creativecommons.org/licenses/MIT/ MIT */ class TaskQueueCapability extends CapabilityToken { public function __construct(string $accountSid, string $authToken, string $workspaceSid, string $taskQueueSid, ?string $overrideBaseUrl = null, ?string $overrideBaseWSUrl = null) { parent::__construct($accountSid, $authToken, $workspaceSid, $taskQueueSid, null, $overrideBaseUrl, $overrideBaseWSUrl); } protected function setupResource(): void { $this->resourceUrl = $this->baseUrl . '/TaskQueues/' . $this->channelId; } }
